items.title: Warrington go top of Super League with comeback win at St Helens
items.summary: Teenager Ewan Irwin shone as Warrington came from behind to move top of the Betfred Super League with a hard-fought 18-6 win at rivals St Helens.

items.title: Three red cards shown as Mexico beat South Africa in World Cup opener
items.summary: Three players are sent off as World Cup co-hosts Mexico defeat South Africa in a dramatic opening match at a packed Azteca Stadium.

items.title: Baffling moment ITV host confuses Graham Potter with Gareth Southgate as fans say ‘World Cup is gonna be so painful’
items.summary: ITV viewers were left baffled after presenter Semra Hunter repeatedly appeared to mistake Graham Potter for Gareth Southgate during the broadcaster's World Cup coverage. items.title: World Cup of Darts: Wales' Clayton and Kenny get off to winning start in group stages
items.summary: Jonny Clayton, alongside new partner Nick Kenny, got their World Cup of Darts campaign under way with a 4-1 victory over Lithuania’s Darius Labanauskas and Mindaugas Barauskas in Group C.

items.title: World Cup of Darts 2026 schedule: Wales kick group-stage off with win
items.summary: Wales started their bid for a third BetVictor World Cup of Darts title on the tournament's opening night with a 4-1 win over Lithuania.

items.title: 'That is superb!' | Clayton gets off to winning start with new World Cup partner
items.summary: Jonny Clayton checks out a ton to get Wales off to a winning start alongside his new World Cup partner Nick Kenny.

items.title: THREE red cards as Mexico get World Cup started with win over South Africa
items.summary: Mexico got their joint-home World Cup off to the perfect start with a 2-0 opening match win over nine-man South Africa - in a game that had THREE red cards.

items.title: Three red cards - are referees getting tough at this World Cup?
items.summary: Three players were sent off in the World Cup opener as Mexico beat South Africa 2-0. Are we about to see a World Cup littered with red cards?

items.title: World Cup kicks off in Mexico with Shakira, dancing, and protests
items.summary: There was a star-studded opening ceremony, and some sporadic clashes between police and protesters around the Azteca stadium.

items.title: McTominay travels separately in Boston as precaution
items.summary: Key midfielder Scott McTominay travelled with a doctor as a precaution prior to Scotland's World Cup opener.

items.title: Why are footballers wearing pink boots at the World Cup?
items.summary: The opening match of the 2026 World Cup was dominated by players wearing pink boots - but why is the colour so prevalent in football at the moment?

items.title: The parents whose boys play in two World Cup teams
items.summary: Jack and Heather Souttar are heading to the USA to support their sons, who play for Scotland and Australia.
